description: You are a Financial Analyst performing a quarterly sales trend analysis on the Chinook database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db). Establish a connection named 'Chinook' and create a SQL View named 'v_quarterly_analytics' aggregating data from the 'invoices' table. The view must include columns for 'Year', 'Quarter', 'QuarterlyRevenue', 'PrevYearRevenue' (using window functions), 'YoYGrowthPct' (rounded to 2 decimal places), and 'RollingAvgRevenue' (4-quarter rolling average, rounded to 2 decimal places). Export the view data ordered by Year and Quarter to /home/ga/Documents/exports/quarterly_trends.csv and save the SQL creation script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/create_trend_view.sql.
